---
title: ""
listing: 
  contents: photography/astro 
feed: 
  title: thhaase-astrophotography
format:
  html: 
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 100px
      gutter-width: 0rem
sidebar:
    style: "docked"
    search: true
    contents:
      - section: "Basics"
        contents:
          - index.qmd
          - basics-knitr.qmd
          - basics-jupyter.qmd
      - section: "Layout"
        contents:
          - layout.qmd
          - layout-knitr.qmd
          - layout-jupyter.qmd
---
:::{.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .center-text}
[My Amateurastrophotography]{.orange-h1-thicc .text-height2}
:::
:::

# Orionnebel
:::{layout-ncol=2}
![Orionnebel](photography/astro/23_02_04_orionnebel/Orionnebel6.jpeg){height=13}

![Orionnebel cropped](photography/astro/23_02_04_orionnebel/Orionnebel2.jpg){height=310}
:::
